reasoning: The control cc_1_3 focuses on establishing structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities. In Kubernetes, this translates to managing access controls and ensuring proper role-based access control (RBAC) configurations. This involves ensuring no excessive privileges are granted (e.g., avoiding cluster-admin bindings), enforcing least privilege, reviewing role bindings to ensure they align with organizational structures, and managing service accounts appropriately to reflect authority and responsibility.
title: CC1.3 COSO Principle 3: Management establishes, with board oversight, structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities in the pursuit of objectives
